aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business prominently due to a lack of structured conversational content and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Create content that answers typical AI-driven queries (e.g., 'best HVAC maintenance tips').

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance and repair tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and creating blog posts with AI-friendly content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and earning backlinks from industry publications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
